zHdistutils.command.build_py
Implements the Distutils 'build_py' command.

Ozlalso compile with optimization: -O1 for "python -O", -O2 for "python -OO", and -O0 to disable [default: -O0])

build_py.build_package_datac
Return the directory, relative to the top of the source
           distribution, where package 'package' should be found
           (at least according to the 'package_dir' option, if any).r.

script_name
splitext
basenamer;
debug_print)	r
module_files
modulesZ
setup_scriptr
abs_frY
find_package_modules
build_py.find_package_modulesc
Finds individually-specified Python modules, ie. those listed by
        module name in 'self.py_modules'.  Returns a list of tuples (package,
        module_base, filename): 'package' is a tuple of the path through
        package-space to the module; 'module_base' is the bare (no
        packages, no dots) module name, and 'filename' is the path to the
        ".py" file (relative to the distribution root) that implements the
        module.
        r.
__init__
.py)
module_baser
checkedrW
find_modules
build_py.find_modulesc
Compute the list of all modules that will be built, whether
        they are specified one-module-at-a-time ('self.py_modules') or
        by whole packages ('self.packages').  Return a list of tuples
        (package, module, module_file), just like 'find_modules()' and
        'find_package_modules()' do.)
find_all_modules
build_py.find_all_modulesc
